name: @rhombus-std/config.examples.with-transformer
description: Runnable @rhombus-std/config example using the @rhombus-std/config.transformer ts-patch plugin: .withType<T>() lowered to a generated .withSchema({...}) at compile time.

scripts.test: bun run build && node dist/main.js > /tmp/rhombus-std-config-examples-with-transformer.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-config-examples-with-transformer.out
